mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM board
subject LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT num, writer, passwd, subject, content, readCnt, ref, ref_step, ref_level, reg_date, ip, rownum rnum FROM ( SELECT * FROM board
subject LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
writer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY ref DESC, ref_step ASC ) ) WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET readCnt= readCnt+1 WHERE num= #{num}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(ref_step), 0) FROM board WHERE ref = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET ref_step = ref_step + 1 WHERE ref = #{ref} AND ref_step >= #{ref_step}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(num, writer, passwd, subject, content, readCnt, ref, ref_step, ref_level, reg_date, ip, org_file_name, stored_file_name, file_size) VALUES(board_seq.nextval, #{writer}, #{passwd}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{readCnt}, #{ref}, #{ref_step}, #{ref_level}, #{reg_date}, #{ip}, #{org_file_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stored_file_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{file_size,jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE num= #{num} AND passwd = #{passwd}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET subject= #{subject}, content= #{content}, passwd= #{passwd} WHERE num= #{num}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE ref= #{ref} AND ref_step= #{ref_step} +1 AND ref_level > #{ref_level}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET ref_step= ref_step -1 WHERE ref= #{ref} AND ref_step > #{ref_step}
